candidates.thesis: Alphabet is a secular growth tech leader with exposure to AI and cloud infrastructure. Strong fundamentals, trading near SMA50 and below 52-week highs, offering a solid entry point.
NVIDIA dominates AI compute infrastructure with its GPUs and software ecosystem. Positioned for multi-year growth in AI and data center demand. RSI is healthy, and price is near SMA50.
Taiwan Semiconductor is a critical player in global semiconductor manufacturing, benefiting from secular growth in AI and advanced compute. Price near SMA50 and below 52-week highs.
Applied Materials is a leader in semiconductor equipment, benefiting from increasing demand for advanced chips and AI-related manufacturing. RSI is healthy, and price is near SMA50.
Quanta Services is a clean energy infrastructure leader with exposure to grid modernization and renewable energy projects. RSI and SMA50 suggest a reasonable entry point.
